title: poa elliottii
intro: Poa elliottii, also known as Elliott's blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Poa elliottii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potential uses in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Poa elliottii can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's essential oils in topical applications.
